name: Blank
description: A neutral shadcn + Tailwind foundation with a single hero. Start here when you want the architect to define the whole look from your prompt, with nothing to unlearn.
whenToUse: Pick when the user wants the look defined entirely from their prompt, when no other kit matches the domain, or when strong existing brand guidelines would fight a pre-styled starting point. Ships a single neutral hero on stock shadcn tokens — nothing to unlearn, but nothing polished out of the box either. Avoid when the user expects a designed result on first render; every other kit lands closer.
